text: 1. **`main.rs`**: change `r#in: Option<u64>` → `Option<Option<u64>>` with `num_args = 0..=1`, so `--in` (no value) = "debounce using config" and `--in 60` = "debounce, 60s override". Update dispatch + doc comment. [...] 3. **`~/.claude/settings.json`**: drop the hardcoded `300` → `pc capture --in`, leaving `capture_debounce_secs` as the single source of truth.
